title: OCI User Password Reset by Admin
description: Detects an administrator resetting another user's console password. This could indicate account takeover or unauthorized access provisioning.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and ((('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.createorupdateuiconsolepassword' or 'Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.resetuiconsolepassword')))
falsepositives: Legitimate password resets by help desk
